---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
# FlipR-data
### Statistical Programmer · R · Shiny
:::

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### 🏥 Pharma & Clinical
**Adverse Event Explorer**  
Interactive Shiny dashboard for CDISC ADaM safety data exploration.  
`Shiny` `CDISC` `ADaM`  
[View project →](projects/pharma/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### ⚽ Sport Analytics
**World Football R**  
Analysis and visualisation of football statistics across Europe's top leagues.  
`ggplot2` `worldfootballR` `tidyverse`  
[View project →](projects/football/index.qmd)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### 📈 Finance
**Portfolio Risk Dashboard**  
Interactive dashboard for portfolio returns and risk metrics.  
`Shiny` `quantmod` `tidyquant`  
[View project →](projects/finance/index.qmd)
:::

:::
